section_titles: Explain the objectives of the report.
Describe the information on the context of the report, such as brief details about the SIP Organisation and your internship role.
State the parameters on which the report is based.
Describe the location and premises of the SIP Organisation
Comment on the conduciveness of the environment for work
Observations on aspects of workplace safety, facilities and equipment, etc.
Provide a brief history of the SIP Organisation
Describe the hierarchy of the SIP Organisation
State the number of departments in the SIP Organisation and give a brief summary of their roles and number of staff
Describe the work culture of the SIP Organisation
Explain the nature of business of the SIP Organisation, objectives, daily operations, etc.
Describe the role and workflow within your department and how it contributes to the objectives of the SIP Organisation

Based on your interaction with a work colleague who is from a different background/ culture (e.g. education, age, nationality or race), what have you noticed about him/ her that is different (e.g. in terms of values, behaviours, attitudes, communication style, etc.)?
How has your perspective changed? What is a new insight you have learnt from this colleague that has changed the way you interact with others?
Summarise your main SIP Learning Outcomes(Generic, Diploma, Organization)
What are the challenges that you have encountered during your learning?
What are some of the learning gaps? How are you planning to close these gaps?
How will these outcomes help you in your career pathway?
Any other points to reflect on your learning?
Summarise the work done in the internship – major milestones, projects, events, etc.
What are the areas of your strength? How do these strengths get your work done effectively? What are the areas for improvement?
What are some of the challenges you have encountered? How do you manage them?
What have you learnt from your work?
Any other points to reflect on your work done?
Describe the networking opportunities during internship
How do you network with your colleagues? What have you learnt from them? What opportunities have you gained?
What are some of the external networking opportunities that you had? How do these contribute to the overall opportunities and experiences which you have gained?
How would you further improve on your networking skills?
Any other points to reflect on your networking opportunities and skills?
Describe the current developments and trends of the industry
How will these developments affect the outlook of the industry?
What are the career pathways in the industry? How will these pathways be affected by recent developments?
What are the other industry insights shared with you by your mentor?
Any other points to reflect on the industry?
Describe how your analytics knowledge and skills can be applied to your work area.
How will the use of data analytics impact the work at your department?
What are some challenges you foresee? (Refer to Learning Outcomes (Diploma-Specific) in the Learning Outcome Form.)
Summarise key points from the above sections
What could have been done to enhance or improve your internship experience?
What you would do to increase on your awareness and knowledge on the industry and career pathways
How you would better prepare yourself for the world of work.
